'''kashozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kweng|kweng]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kweng|kweng]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kashozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæshezeth|kæshezeth]] || [[word:kæshezej|kæshezej]] || [[word:kæshezesh|kæshezesh]] || [[word:kæsheze|kæsheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kashoshozoth|kashoshozoth]] || [[word:kashoshozoj|kashoshozoj]] || [[word:kashoshozosh|kashoshozosh]] || [[word:kashoshozo|kashoshozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kashozoth|kashozoth]] || [[word:kashozoj|kashozoj]] || [[word:kashozosh|kashozosh]] || [[word:kashozo|kashozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kashofzoth|kashofzoth]] || [[word:kashofzoj|kashofzoj]] || [[word:kashofzosh|kashofzosh]] || [[word:kashofzof|kashofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kashozotho|kashozotho]] || [[word:kashozojo|kashozojo]] || [[word:kashozosho|kashozosho]] || [[word:kashozoko|kashozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kashozoth|kashozoth]] || [[word:kashozoj|kashozoj]] || [[word:kashozosh|kashozosh]] || [[word:kashozo|kashozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kashozothol|kashozothol]] || [[word:kashozojol|kashozojol]] || [[word:kashozoshol|kashozoshol]] || [[word:kashozokol|kashozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kashozothotho|kashozothotho]] || [[word:kashozojojo|kashozojojo]] || [[word:kashozoshosho|kashozoshosho]] || [[word:kashozoko|kashozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kashozothon|kashozothon]] || [[word:kashozojon|kashozojon]] || [[word:kashozoshon|kashozoshon]] || [[word:kashozokon|kashozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kashozothoro|kashozothoro]] || [[word:kashozojoro|kashozojoro]] || [[word:kashozoshoro|kashozoshoro]] || [[word:kashozokoro|kashozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
